subtitle.ja: 人差し指の構えから始めます。両手の小指の糸を外します
subtitle.en: Begin from Opening A. Remove the little-finger strings on both hands.

subtitle.ja: 左右の人差し指の輪を小指に移します
subtitle.en: Transfer the loops from both index fingers onto the little fingers.

subtitle.ja: 左親指向こうの糸を右手で持ち、左小指に反時計回りで1周巻きます
subtitle.en: With the right hand, take the far string on the left thumb and wrap it once counterclockwise around the left little finger.

subtitle.ja: 左小指の上の輪の中から下の輪を引き出し、小指から全ての糸を外して引き出した輪だけをかけ直します
subtitle.en: Pull the lower loop out through the upper loop on the left little finger, remove all strings from the little finger, and replace only the extracted loop onto it.

subtitle.ja: 左小指手前の糸を右手で持ち、左親指に時計回りで1周巻きます
subtitle.en: With the right hand, take the near string on the left little finger and wrap it once clockwise around the left thumb.

subtitle.ja: 左親指の上の輪の中から下の輪を引き出し、親指から全ての糸を外して引き出した輪だけをかけ直します
subtitle.en: Pull the lower loop out through the upper loop on the left thumb, remove all strings from the thumb, and replace only the extracted loop onto it.

subtitle.ja: 左親指と小指の前にある輪を中央に移動させます
subtitle.en: Move the loop in front of the left thumb and little finger to the center.

subtitle.ja: 同様の操作を繰り返すことで、パターンを何個でも作ることができます
subtitle.en: By repeating the same actions, you can make as many patterns as you like.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指の輪に人差し指を下から入れて、輪を移します
subtitle.en: Insert the index fingers from below into the thumb loops on both hands, transferring the loops.

subtitle.ja: 左右の親指で、小指手前の糸と人差し指向こうの糸を下から取ります。人差し指から糸を外します
subtitle.en: With both thumbs, pick up from below the near little-finger strings and the far index-finger strings. Remove the strings from the index fingers.

subtitle.ja: 小指の輪に人差し指を上から入れ、親指向こうの糸を取ります。人差し指の糸を親指で押さえ、両手を向こう側に向けて完成です
subtitle.en: Move the index fingers over and pick down into the little-finger loops, and pick up the far thumb strings. Hold the index-finger strings down with the thumbs, turn both hands to the far side, and finish.
